flashcards.definition: If two angles and the included side are congruent, the triangles are congruent.
If two angles and a non-included side are congruent, the triangles are congruent.
The side between two given angles of a triangle.
For right triangles: if hypotenuse and one leg are congruent, the triangles are congruent.
Two sides and a non-included angle do NOT guarantee congruence (ambiguous case).
